questions.context_sentence: I'm a bit worried about keeping up with the other students in my advanced course, and it'll be quite difficult to get used to all the homework.
questions.cn: 我有点担心跟不上我高级课程中的其他学生，而且要适应所有的家庭作业会相当困难。
questions.hint: 词根词缀：re（回）+ spons（承诺，响应）+ ible（能...的）-> 能回应承诺的，负责任的。
